creator: haenno@web.de
text:
Current version seems to be "455.45.01".

  FREEBSD DISPLAY DRIVER – X64
  Version:	455.45.01
  Release Date:	2020.11.17

From: https://www.nvidia.com/Download/driverResults.aspx/166884/en-us

They added support for: GeForce RTX 3060 Ti and the rest of the GeForce RTX 30 Series: 
  GeForce RTX 3090, GeForce RTX 3080, GeForce RTX 3070
